details.productUrlName: Subterranean Tremors JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: Subterranean Tremors deals X damage to each creature without flying. If X is 4 or more, destroy all artifacts. If X is 8 or more, create an 8/8 red Lizard creature token.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"There is one beast that makes even titans quail and quake in fear. We shall not name it here, for to name it is to call it."
—A History of Ruinations
